findings.title: Fixture timeout is not forwarded
findings.scenario: A fixture with a short timeout keeps running because timeoutMinutes never reaches runCheck.

refutations.reasoning: The option is absent at the runCheck call site.

findings.title: Admin update skips authorization
findings.scenario: An unauthenticated caller can update admin state through POST while GET remains protected.

refutations.reasoning: The changed POST path no longer calls the authorization guard.

findings.title: Partial final page is dropped
findings.scenario: Eleven items with a page size of ten report one page instead of two.

refutations.reasoning: Floor division drops every non-empty remainder.

findings.title: Currency scaling is incorrect
findings.scenario: A cent value is divided by 1000 and formats at one tenth of the expected amount.

refutations.reasoning: The divisor changed from cents-per-unit to an incorrect value.

findings.title: Empty input dereferences a missing value
findings.scenario: Calling the statistics function with an empty array dereferences an undefined element.

refutations.reasoning: No empty-array guard exists before the dereference.

findings.title: File handles remain open on failure
findings.scenario: Repeated failed reads exhaust available file descriptors because the opened handle is not closed.

refutations.reasoning: The error path bypasses the close operation.

findings.title: API key is written to logs
findings.scenario: A request carrying an API key emits the credential in plaintext application logs.

refutations.reasoning: The logging call interpolates the key without redaction.

findings.title: Multibyte cache keys collide
findings.scenario: Distinct Unicode inputs truncate to the same byte-insensitive prefix and share a cache entry.

refutations.reasoning: String length and byte length diverge for the supplied inputs.

findings.title: Refactor may alter slug output
findings.scenario: Whitespace normalization might produce a different slug for repeated spaces.

refutations.reasoning: Both implementations collapse repeated whitespace to the same single separator.

findings.title: Implementation enables the wrong feature
findings.scenario: The requested feature remains disabled while an unrelated feature becomes enabled.

refutations.reasoning: The changed feature identifier differs from the intent.

findings.title: Calculator result regresses
findings.scenario: The changed calculation returns the wrong value and the captured pytest assertion fails.

refutations.reasoning: The captured assertion directly exercises the changed calculation.

findings.title: Rust path panics
findings.scenario: The changed input reaches an unwrap on an absent value and the captured cargo test panics.

refutations.reasoning: The captured panic originates in the changed function.
